common.priceNote: Prices shown reflect the Smartstore listing.

home.heroSlogan: Twenty years of golden harvest along the Hantangang.
home.brandLeadTitle: Long-aged grain, the gold nature grants.
home.brandLeadBody: Geumbit Farm grows golden sanghwang naturally on oak logs along the Hantangang River. We have chosen the slow path of long maturation over short-term efficiency.
home.b2bTitle: Trusted material partner to Korea's leading health-food brands
home.b2bBody: Our long-verified golden sanghwang material has been supplied to major domestic health-food companies for years.
home.ctaBody: Discover nine selections of whole, sliced, extract, and fermented sanghwang.

brand.title: BRAND STORY
brand.subtitle: The path Geumbit Farm has walked

products.title: PRODUCTS
products.subtitle: Nine Sanghwang Selections
products.intro: From whole material to extract and fermented liquid. A lineup imbued with the time of the Hantangang.

product.aboutBody: Golden sanghwang cultivated naturally on oak logs in the pristine Hantangang region. In accordance with general food labeling guidelines, no medicinal efficacy claims are made.
product.storageBody: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. After opening, seal tightly and consume as soon as practical.
product.cautionBody: This product is a general food, not a medicine. Pregnant or nursing women and persons under treatment for specific conditions should consult a professional before use. Per advertising guidelines, no medicinal efficacy is claimed.

certifications.title: CERTIFICATIONS
certifications.subtitle: Certifications & Test Reports
certifications.emptyState: Certifications will be published here, including organic certification, GAP, HACCP, and β-glucan content test reports.

contact.title: CONTACT
contact.subtitle: Get in Touch
contact.intro: For orders, wholesale, and other inquiries, please reach us through the channels below. For order and shipping questions, the Naver Smartstore is the fastest route.

footer.disclaimer: All products on this site are general foods, not medicines.
